user_query:
I’m the head coach and I rely on our star, Jordan King, to set the tone for team culture. Please analyze last week’s practices and produce an evidence-based Leadership Impact Brief that helps me plan next week.

Inputs (all under the local workspace):
- input/attendance.csv
- input/performance.csv
- input/notes.jsonl
- input/practice_logs/ (a directory of daily practice logs)

Deliverables:
1) Generate a per-date summary CSV at output/per_date_summary.csv with these columns for each practice date in ascending order:
   - date (YYYY-MM-DD)
   - star_present (true/false, where true if Jordan King is marked present that date in attendance.csv)
   - attendance_rate (present count divided by total players listed for that date)
   - team_efficiency (from performance.csv)
   - mood_score (from performance.csv)

2) Generate a leadership rankings CSV at output/leadership_rankings.csv using input/notes.jsonl:
   - Columns: player, mentions_total, positive_mentions, positive_ratio (positive_mentions / mentions_total)
   - Aggregate across all notes. Sort by positive_mentions (descending), then positive_ratio (descending), then player name (ascending) to break ties.

3) Compose a concise report at output/leadership_brief.md that includes:
   - Data coverage check:
     • List the unique dates found in input/attendance.csv and input/performance.csv and confirm they match.
     • Inspect input/practice_logs/ and identify any date(s) present in attendance/performance that have no matching practice log .md file; list those missing dates explicitly.
   - Key stats:
     • Compute and state the average team_efficiency when star_present is true vs when it’s false, and the numeric difference.
     • State the average mood_score for the same two groups.
   - Top leadership contributors:
     • List the top 3 players from output/leadership_rankings.csv with their positive_mentions and positive_ratio.
   - Highlights:
     • Include two short, verbatim “Highlight:” lines extracted from input/practice_logs/*.md on days when Jordan King was present (include the date and file path for each quote).
   - Recommendations for next week:
     • Provide 2–3 actionable bullets on practice structure and leadership delegation grounded in the computed stats (no outside info).

Constraints and notes:
- Use a local script or command-line pipeline to generate the CSVs from the inputs. Do not hand-edit outputs.
- Base all calculations strictly on the provided files. Ensure results are reproducible from the inputs.
- Treat player names consistently across files (e.g., "Jordan King" exactly as written in notes.jsonl and attendance.csv).
- The brief should reference the exact dates and file paths it uses so I can verify quickly.

I will verify by recomputing your aggregates from the inputs and by checking that the listed missing log dates truly have no corresponding .md file in input/practice_logs/.
 All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
